subcodes.title: Words spoken in Dec. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Nicodemus was a learned man; nevertheless he was one of those to whom Jesus referred when He said, 'Because seeing, they see not
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @development of capacity and readiness, @Word of God and human limitations, @differences in human capacity, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
